Get in Touch

We're here to help and answer any questions you might have. Reach out to us for inquiries about admissions, academics, placements, or general information.

Grievance Redressal

Jerusalem College of Engineering is committed to addressing student and stakeholder grievances promptly and fairly. If you have any concerns or complaints, please use our official grievance portal.

Grievance Officer

Dr. K. Ramesh

Email

grievance@jerusalemcoe.ac.in

Phone

+91-44-2246 9999
Submit Grievance

As per UGC (Student Grievance Redressal) Regulations
